stemHtml: An aeroplane in straight and level flight at 200 kt is subjected to a sudden disturbance in speed. Assuming the angle of attack remains constant initially and the load factor reaches a value of 1.44:

options.a: the speed will have decreased by 40 kt.
options.b: the speed will have decreased by 20 kt.
options.c: the speed will have increased by 20 kt.
options.d: the speed will have increased by 40 kt.
